content: Drizzle ORM migrations (codebase-first): define schema in db/schema.ts using pg-core builders (pgTable, serial, text, etc.) and relations. drizzle-kit generate diffs schema vs migrations folder and emits a versioned SQL migration file (committed to git) — this is the production path. drizzle-kit push pushes schema directly to DB (prototyping only, not for production/team workflow). drizzle.config.ts points at schema + migrations + DB credentials. Never hand-write SQL migrations; always generate via drizzle-kit generate after schema changes, then apply with drizzle-kit migrate.
